disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: New hantavirus infection confirmed in Hondius crew member isolated in Netherlands - NL Times

updates.body_en: How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away AP News WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera Number of reported cases of hantavirus rises to 12, 3 reported deaths: WHO Xinhua
